properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If My people who are called by My Name Will humble themselves and pray Seek My face and turn from their wicked ways I will hear from Heaven Forgive their sins and heal their land If My people will humble themselves and pray

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Return to Me and I will return to you You will be My people And I will be your God Return to Me and I will return to you I'll give you a heart to know Me And I will be your God If My people will humble themselves and pray

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As Your people we have turned and walked away From the truth from the light from the way We confess we have failed We humble our hearts today Will you hear from Heaven Forgive our sins and heal our land As Your people, we humble our hearts and pray

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Return to Me and I will return to you You will be My people And I will be your God Return to Me and I will return to you I'll give you a heart to know Me And I will be your God If My people will humble themselves and pray

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We cry out to You We cry out to You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Lord have mercy on Your people We humble ourselves and pray And turn from our wicked ways Lord have mercy on our nation Forgive us of our sins Revive our hearts again

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We return to You We return to You We return to You We return to You We return to You We return to You

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: You said Return to Me and I will return to you You will be My people And I will be your God Return to Me and I will return to you I'll give you a heart to know Me And I will be your God If My people will humble themselves and pray If My people will humble themselves and pray If My people will humble themselves and pray

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: We cry out to You We cry out to You

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Lord have mercy on Your people We humble ourselves and pray And turn from our wicked ways Lord have mercy on our nation Forgive us of our sins Revive our hearts again

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: We return to You We return to You We return to You We return to You We return to You We return to You
